# Situation (template)

<!-- Delete any line you don't need. Fill in the (...) and paste into the Run tab's situation field. -->

## Era
(e.g. present day / 1923 / near-future 2087 / a medieval-fantasy world)

## Place / setting
(e.g. a foreign quarter of a port town / a mining colony on Mars / a mountain village / a royal academy)
(Scope: the story mostly stays within ..., etc.)

## Season / time / weather
(e.g. a rainy evening in late autumn / high noon in midsummer)

## World / background
(rules of this world, social situation, tech level, magic or not — 3–5 lines)

## Opening scene
(Describe the very first scene: who is where doing what, and what happens.)
(e.g. On a stormy night a soaked student rushes into an old bookshop; in hand, a strange old map—)

## Goal / direction (optional)
(e.g. the two solve the map's riddle and reach the lighthouse's secret / no fixed goal, just portray the characters)

## Constraints / forbidden (optional)
(e.g. no deaths / keep everything explainable by science / stay within the setting)

## Initial placement of characters
- (role id 1): (e.g. keeping the books at the back; has not met the other yet)
- (role id 2): (e.g. bursts in fleeing the storm)
